hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo "ERROR: You are on main. Create a feature branch before making changes."; exit 1; fi
git checkout main 2>/dev/null && git pull origin main 2>/dev/null && git fetch --prune origin 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Syncing main and pruning stale branches...
